mapper.select:
SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts
is_deleted = false
AND category = #{category}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY view_count DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(id) FROM posts
is_deleted = false
AND category = #{category}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY view_count DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT name FROM categories ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT id, post_id AS postId, parent_id AS parentId, author, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT pt.tag_name AS name, COUNT(pt.post_id) AS count FROM post_tags pt JOIN posts p ON pt.post_id = p.id WHERE p.is_deleted = false GROUP BY pt.tag_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
